## Summary

Cleans the evaluate and report pages to remove internal telemetry that authors should never see. Tightens the top layout to get the Overview above the fold. Adds plain-language confidence legend with color-coded badges and a privacy assurance note.

This is **PR A** from the privacy model split. **PR B** (author-controlled support access with audit log, `evaluation_support_access_grants` table) will follow as a separate PR.

## What Changed

### Evaluate page (`app/evaluate/[jobId]/page.tsx`)
- **Removed Key Metrics section** — chunks analyzed, successfully processed, score ledger, evaluation status. Internal pipeline telemetry, not author-relevant.
- **Removed Evaluation Provenance section** — engine model, provider, prompt version, confidence %, limitations. Internal system metadata.
- **Removed `isAdminViewer` gate** — this was the wrong approach. Support access will be permission-based (PR B), not role-based.
- **Compact header** — merged title + status badge + word count into a single header area. Removed separate "Evaluation Metadata" section (was duplicating Job ID, title). Removed separate status badge card.
- **Reduced spacing** — `mb-6` → `mb-4`, `p-4` → `p-3`, `mt-6` → `mt-4` throughout.
- **Plain-language confidence legend** — replaced numeric thresholds ("≥80", "60–79", "<60") with author-friendly descriptions and color-coded badges matching the criteria display.
- **Removed unused helpers** — `formatScore()`, `Metric` component.

### Reports page (`app/reports/[jobId]/page.tsx`)
- **Removed AgentTrustHeader** — matrix version, applicability counts (R/O/NA/C), repro anchor. Internal telemetry.
- **Removed Evaluation Metadata footer** — model, confidence %, processing time, duplicate word count, job ID. All internal.
- **Removed `isAdminViewer` check** — same reasoning as evaluate page.
- **Compact header** — reduced from `text-4xl` to `text-2xl`, tighter padding, download button aligned right.
- **Added privacy assurance note** — "Your manuscript is private. RevisionGrade support and admin staff will never access your novel or evaluation data unless you explicitly grant temporary permission for troubleshooting."
- **Plain-language confidence legend** — same update as evaluate page.

## Scope

**Touches:** `app/evaluate/[jobId]/page.tsx`, `app/reports/[jobId]/page.tsx`

**Does NOT touch:**
- Download route (`app/api/reports/[jobId]/download/route.ts`) — branded templates from PR #776 are unchanged
- Pipeline or evaluation logic
- Story Ledger components
- Database schema (that's PR B)
- AgentTrustHeader component file (still exists, just not rendered)

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- **No data loss** — technical sections are removed from rendering only, not from the underlying data model. All telemetry remains in the artifact JSON and can be surfaced again via PR B's permission-based access.
- **Privacy note is static** — until PR B lands, the "grant permission" flow doesn't exist yet. The note sets the expectation that it's coming.
- **Lint deprecation warning** is pre-existing (Next.js 16 `next lint` deprecation), not caused by this PR.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — UI-only changes to page rendering. No pipeline, evaluation, or API logic modified.
